name: End's Reach
short_description: End's Reach is a 3D Exploration Action Adventure Game that focuses on a character lost in the depths of space. Players will solve puzzles, collect upgrades, items, weapons and even magical abilities as they uncover the mysteries of this strange new world. A classic tale of technology taken too far.
detailed_description:
The solo-developer Atari VCS cult-classic Metroidvania is coming to Steam for PC, Linux, and Mac! No early access - a finished and complete experience on day-one!

End's Reach is a 3D Exploration Action Adventure Game that focuses on a character lost in the depths of space. Players will solve puzzles, collect upgrades, items, weapons and even magical abilities as they uncover the mysteries of this strange new world. A classic tale of technology taken too far.

Control Scheme

This game was designed originally for a controller but supports play with mouse, keyboard, trackpad and keyboard-only (keys for camera). The experiences may vary but ideally you should be able to play in any configuration you choose.

Explore an Open World

Discover four unique worlds, seal the wormholes. A unique blend of linear action-adventure gameplay and open-world problem solving.

Dungeons

Embrace old-school game design. Each zone is complete with it's own challenges, enemies, hidden items, and of course - large dungeons! Solve puzzles, unlock abilities and defeat great foes to put these ancient wonders to rest.

Accessible Gameplay

End's Reach is not a souls-like! It is designed for players of all skill-levels and the journey itself is the experience.

Upgrades & Weapons

Hidden in every corner of End's Reach are items and upgrades. Weapons, suit upgrades, components. Increase your maximum health, sprint for long distances, become an armoured fortress. The more you explore, the more powerful you will become. Only the most experienced player will uncover all of the secrets End's Reach has to offer in it's darkest places.
